headline: Precise Deep Tissue Massage in Chelsea
description:
I provide a great therapeutic massage! I specialize in Deep Tissue, but the most important aspect of my massage is giving you a personalized experience based on your individual needs.

My touch is for the most part strong, slow and deliberate. I spend time in the areas where you need it most, and I'm very intuitive. If you are looking for a really good massage, in fact, one of the best you've ever had, you have come to the right place.

My private studio is centrally located in Chelsea. I have seven years of experience and I love developing long-term relationships with my clients. I am Covid and Monkeypox vaccinated. I have excellent hygiene, and I appreciate the same. I provide a non-discriminatory practice and I am very open-minded. Gay, bisexual, and straight men are more than welcome! Women too!

A day's notice guarantees that I can see you, but I also try to accommodate last-minute requests. I only do massages in the afternoons and evenings. I NORMALLY WORK UNTIL 5 AM (on my art) EVERY NIGHT, so if you text me in the morning, PLEASE BE PATIENT; you will hear back from me around 1:30 PM.

If you would like one of the best therapeutic massages in New York City, you came to the right place!

headline: Experience the Zen feeling!
description:
A restorative, intentional massage experience guided by a well-traveled fitness professional who understands the body beyond technique.

My approach blends functional massage, assisted stretching, and intuitive touch to help you unwind, reset, and feel at ease in your body. Years of working with movement, mobility, and recovery have taught me how tension forms — and how to release it in a way that’s both effective and deeply calming.

I bring a grounded, unhurried presence to each session. The atmosphere is relaxed, respectful, and quietly sensual — focused on breath, flow, and connection rather than routine or rush. Whether you’re looking to recover from training, long travel, or daily stress, the work is adapted to what your body needs in that moment.

Travel and time spent across different cultures have shaped my style: attentive, intuitive, and rooted in listening rather than force. This is massage meant to restore function, soothe the nervous system, and leave you feeling centered and open.

Clean, professional, discreet.
A space to slow down, let go, and feel well cared for.

headline: Ritualistic. Sensual. Massage Artist.
description:
Hey there! 

My name is Weston, I’m a lover, an LMT, a General Contractor, and an athlete.
I’ve been a practitioner of heart centered bodywork for 4 years, and I would 
love. to. worship. your. body. 🤍

I love what I do and I’m a believer that you’ll be thinking about our session for days to come :) 

I cater every session to your specificity.
As a great listener with a deeply giving nature, I am attuned to your body and energy field for our entire time together. 
Fall into my arms, spill your heart to me. I’m here for YOU, and your divine pleasure. 

I encourage you to bring anything that’s on your heart to our session. I want to be a safe space for you to let go of what’s burdening you. My wish is that you can fullly surrender into the relaxation, excitement & sensation that my hands, and spirit can provide. During a session I am in complete devotion to you & welcome all of you.
I am trained in several modalities of emotional holding, and I believe pleasure can be a way into some of our most tender parts. 

My ideal client wants to explore these tender parts with a kind, caring, attentive, integrous, strong, & noble man. 

I utilize many techniques & trainings in my practice. Swedish, Myofascial release, craniosacral therapy, and trigger point are all featured during a session. 
+ I am a trained & certified Reiki Practitioner.

A client favorite is Lomi Lomi, which is a traditional Hawaiian Technique born from the waves of the Pacific Ocean. This style is extremely smooth & full of glide. The practitioner uses arms, legs, and chest, with plenty of oil, to simulate the feeling of waves on the body. It is a truly magical experience. 

The energy throughout our session gradually builds, and at peak flow, your heart will be pounding. 
We begin the session with an intention, and we can work with that intention at peak flow. 

I have a beautiful studio space for us in Denver, where you can shower after your session. 

I truly can’t wait to meet you! 
Cheers
-Weston

headline: Where Men Let Go
description:
My name is Jorge. I am a licensed massage therapist and the founder of Cielo Well Space, a boutique studio in Olde City, Philadelphia, located in a quiet, discreet area designed for those who value privacy, silence, and genuine presence.

I work primarily with men who are looking for more than a standard massage. My approach is close, attentive, and deeply personalized. Consistent 5-star reviews reflect an experience where you feel seen, heard, and held with real care. There are no mechanical routines or automatic movements here. Each session is created in the moment. Every touch is intentional. Every technique responds to your body—its tension, its rhythm, what it is ready to release.

I integrate deep tissue massage, assisted stretching, hot stone therapy, and cupping in a fluid and precise way, creating work that is firm, enveloping, and conscious.
For those seeking a more therapeutic approach, the work can be clinical and specific, focused on relieving deep tension and improving mobility.
And for those who want to lower their guard, slow their breath, and disconnect from the noise, I design an intimate, deeply relaxing experience—one where time softens, the body unwinds, and the mind settles into a sustained sense of calm.

I am available every day starting at 11:00 a.m. and accept all forms of payment.

Schedule your therapeutic session exclusively through www.cielo-spa.com. For a more personalized experience or specific requests, feel free to reach out by text message. Allow yourself a space where your body can let go—without explanation.

headline: Hands, heart, connection - feel phenomenal today!
description:
Happy Pride! 🏳️‍🌈  And welcome to summer!

With warmer weather, fuller schedules, and more time spent on the go, the summer season is the right time to remember to stay mindful of hydration, recovery from outdoor activities, and how your body is feeling in all the summer hustle and bustle. Massage can help support circulation, reduce tension, and keep you feeling more grounded, more mobile, and healthier as summertime unfolds.

About me:
I'm an educated, experienced licensed massage professional with an empathetic approach to bodywork.  

Having had years of previous experience in a fast-paced environment with long hours, I understand modern-day stress and its effects on the mind and body.  Most massage professionals learn by training, and then by experience, that many people are touch-deprived, even persons that have regular face-to-face interaction with others.  So with that in mind, my massage work always begins with the compassionate intention to mitigate stress and reduce the touch-deficit.

I provide professional massage and bodywork for all walks of life.  My work and workspace are non-judgmental, LGBTQIA+ friendly, and open to any age, race, body shape, or gender identity.  Client comfort and wellbeing are important to me.  So I do my best to keep the studio a safe, comfortable, welcoming place for you to experience healing, fulfilling male touch. 

Sessions take place in a clean, warm, private space.  The room is equipped with gentle lighting, soft music, a comfortable professional massage table, and fresh linens.  I wrap-up each session with soothing warm towels.

My working hours:  
9AM - 8PM Monday through Friday
9AM - 4PM Saturday
Closed on Sunday

Contact:  By text, phone, or email

Therapeutic Massage
A therapeutic massage focuses on improving physical and mental health. It can help with pain relief, stress reduction, improved circulation, and greater flexibility or range of motion. The goal of this massage is to address specific health concerns and promote overall wellness.

Sensual Massage
Sensual massage is intended to create a relaxing and pleasurable experience through touch. It uses broad, flowing strokes across the entire body to highlight the sensuality of the experience rather than focus on a specific therapeutic outcome. Over time, I began writing what I noticed.

The subtle ways people open. The pauses. The quiet shifts between comfort, curiosity, vulnerability, and connection.

These reflections now live as sensual memoirs inspired by observation and experience. If you feel drawn toward that atmosphere, I invite you to explore my writing and visual work through my website.

New guests are invited to visit my website and complete the private scheduling form. Once received, I will respond personally through email correspondence.

All communication is private and discreet.

Jameson Dwayne

headline: Masculine Bonding
description:
Hey brothers. In this day and age men have less and less time and ways to connect with each other, to connect with their bodies, and to bond over our shared masculinity. I’m here to do my part to create ways for us men to reclaim our primal nature, to be proud of our bodies, to enjoy being men, and to foster authentic brotherhood. One way I am doing this is through bodywork.

To each session I bring my whole body, mind, heart, and my way of being in the world as a strong and sensual man. I use a lot of really long and slow strokes, working to lengthen and bring space to the connective tissue throughout the body. I also work on trigger points along the way, and include some stretching. I treat our sessions as a sacred container where you are free to be authentically you, and explore what it feels like to completely relax, let go, and feel bliss in your body. Masculine touch and brotherly bonding is missing in a lot of men's lives today; I’ve got you brother, come get your cup filled. My space is private and our sessions are always confidential. I'm both professional and very down to earth and easy going. 

Best way to reach me is to send me a message on this site or send me a text and include the following:
1) Location (Louisville? Elsewhere?)
2) Any scheduling preferences you have (Weekday mornings? Afternoons? Tuesdays after 3p, etc)
3) If texting, mention that you found me through this listing here on RentMasseur. 
**If you don’t include the info above when messaging me I might not respond to you as I get a lot of spam messages. Answering these three shows me you’re a real human =). 

I primarily work on folks at my home studio in Louisville. Outcalls in Louisville are available for a fee. I travel often to the Asheville, NC area and Greenville, SC area. When traveling, I can do outcalls at your place if you’re near the Asheville/Greenville areas.

description:

Hey guys,

Thanks for checking out my profile. Please read through before contacting me. :) Check out my reviews!

Scheduling in advance is the best way to guarantee an appointment! I try to keep my schedule flexible, but it’s very unlikely that I can accomodate a last minute request. My business hours are daytimes (limited evenings and weekends with advance notice).

 I provide a therapeutic style of massage with a sprinkling of relaxation (Swedish). I use a variety of pressures and techniques to address acute and chronic aches, pains, stiffness, tightness, and muscular dysfunction. Your individualized session includes a methodical protocol to address your areas of concern. I use my palms, fists, fingers, forearms, elbows, cups, tools, and assisted stretching to help soften and relax your body. My pressure ranges from light to heavy and is determined by your personal reaction to pressure. By working through discomfort and releasing tension, you leave your session feeling lighter and relaxed. At times you may feel a ‘hurts-so-good’ sensation but never pain.

I am often able to ameliorate or resolve pain issues. I receive almost universal praise from clients and many leave saying, ‘Best massage of my life.’

Let me know what’s going on with you, and we can determine an appropriate treatment.

Through guided awareness and intentional touch, we release tension in problematic areas and bring the mind into the body.

Somatic means: "of the body." Somatic touch brings the mind into coherence with the body for awareness and healing. Sessions begin at the head with a gentle, hands-on technique where I get a sense for your body's natural rhythm, find imbalances, and reset your nervous system before we go deeper. We then move to a range of options from targeted sports massage to tissue release to sensual massage.

headline: Lesson Learned
description:
Growing up in the Bay Area I've always loved meeting and connecting with people but I've also been a bit too shy and had to connect with most people a little slower than most. As an adult it was my more intimate connections that allowed me the ease and confidence to overcome a lot of my shyness (most but not all..lol)
My love for massage stems from being able to make people feel relaxed and connected in an accommodating and comfortable atmosphere. I later decided to see if transitioning from giving casual massages to professional ones would work for me as well.
Years later I am still enjoying what I do and have decided to take what I do to the next level and putting a spin on my profession and see if I have even more enjoyable success.
In general my massages are more successfully given and received once the client and I have established a level of comfortability established prior to the initial massage. The more information a client is willing or able to provide me along with information from me makes the initial meeting more enjoyable. 
Feel free to be as open as you're comfortable with when inquiring about my service and any requests or conditions you may want or need to make your visit more enjoyable are also welcomed.

headline: Shameless Hands Of Light!
description:
With over 14 years of professional gay male massage experience, a passion for male bonding in body, mind and spirit and a lifetime of intuitive touch, I've enjoyed providing sensual therapeutic bodywork for relaxation and healing for the Queer community. I provide a safe space for exchanging and exploring queer ****** physical energy through mutual sensual touch and melding into one another’s bodies. The massage modalities I have been trained in that I most commonly use is a blend of shiatsu, Swedish and deep tissue. I will also integrate some stretches into the massage. Towards the end of the session, I will have you turn over onto your back to work on your neck, chest and shoulders as well as some work on your legs accompanied by stretching and joint mobilization exercises. Feel free to guide me on what is most pleasurable for you. I will customize my style to adapt to your therapeutic needs as well as for your more intimate sensual desires. Please let me know how I can provide you with an extraordinary massage... what have you enjoyed about previous massages? What do you enjoy most ******ally? What would you have in mind to make this not only very therapeutic for you but also what will make this experience smoldering hot for you? I'm very confident I will take you to the next level of pleasure while I work your kinks... ;-)

If you feel at any time during the session that you need a break for a tissue, some water or a bathroom break, etc, do not hesitate to let me know. Also please let me know of areas on your body that you need intensive work such as tension/knots in the neck, shoulders, back, etc and let me know if there are any areas you prefer that I avoid such as injury, surgery, sensitive or ticklish areas, etc. I'd like to know what's on your mind. Feel free to talk candidly with me about what you'd like from the massage and anything else that may help me create the best possible experience for you. 

Fully vaxxed for Covid (x4) and MPX (x2)

headline: Balanced Bodywork
description:
Rates: $175/60min, $200/90min, $250/120min

My name is Ron, I have been a practicing massage therapist since 1995. I earned my CMT in Deep Tissue and Shiatsu from "San Francisco School of Massage". After 30 years of experience working on many different types of people, my massage has evolved into a combination of Deep Tissue, Shiatsu, and Swedish. I use medium to deep pressure depending on your needs and can adjust the pressure according to your liking. My focus is on quality therapeutic massage. I use Deep Tissue for all bound up muscles, Shiatsu to promote energy flow throughout the body, Swedish to keep you relaxed, and stretching to lengthen the muscles and promote range of motion and circulation. I do my best to create a clean, relaxing and tranquil environment for you to escape. You'll unwind on a heated massage table with flannel sheets to keep you nice and warm throughout the massage. I use Biotone Herbal Select massage lotion and Biotone Herbal Select Foot Therapy, both are water base lotions that leave the skin feeling fantastic afterwards. All clients may shower before or after the massage. 

Rates: $175/60min, $200/90min, $250/120min

*COVID-19 Vaccinated and boosted as of 9/25. Monkey Pox vaccinated on 7/22 and 9/22.

headline: Playful grounded human offering tantric touch 🤍
description:
Hello, I am Roni 🙏🏼

Whether you are familiar with Tantra or curious to receive your first experience, I am honored to have you here.

I have created this offering using tantric practices that have profoundly transformed my own relationship with intimacy, connection, and embodiment. My intention is to provide a safe and intentional space where you can slow down, connect with your body, and experience greater presence, pleasure, and self-awareness.

A tantric massage is a guided journey that combines meditation, breath awareness, eye gazing, conscious touch, and massage. Sessions begin with a brief check-in and grounding practice to help you arrive fully in the present moment. From there, we move into a practitioner-led massage designed to awaken awareness, relax the nervous system, and support the flow of life-force energy throughout the body.

Clients may experience deep relaxation, emotional release, expanded pleasure, greater connection to their bodies, or a renewed sense of vitality and presence. Every session is unique, and there is no expectation for any particular outcome.

Consent, communication, and boundaries are central to my practice. This is a practitioner-led experience centered on the art of receiving. While the massage may include sensual touch as part of the session, the role of the client is to receive. This is not a mutual exchange, and I do not offer additional services beyond the scope of the massage.

Any physical contact directed toward me, including touching, requires explicit discussion and consent beforehand.

My commitment is to create a space where both practitioner and client feel safe, respected, and fully present. Clear boundaries are an essential part of that container.

If you’re curious and would like to learn more or set up a session, let’s connect ☺️

Outcalls only for first time clients. Incalls available for repeat clients.

headline: Are You Crazy About Hairy?
description:
Muscular***Hairy***Certified***Experienced***Knowledgeable***Intuitive

I offer therapeutic, relaxation and tantric/sensual bodywork and am centrally located in the neighborhood of Cathedral Hill 4 blocks from  City Hall. I have studied over 1500 hours at the Pacific College of Oriental Medicine (PCOM) to obtain my Holistic Health Practitioner (HHP) status. I am certified in Corrective Exercise through the National Association of Sports Medicine (NASM).

My style incorporates Asian modalities, as well as western massage techniques. Although I offer an excellent relaxation massage using a spa-like approach with essential oils and hot towels, my specialty is in therapeutic massage. My therapeutic approach assists in aches/pains and injury recovery. I focus on deep tissue to release adhesions, as well as stretching exercises using Perioceptive Neromuscular Faciltation (PNF) to increase range of motion, improve performance and reduce the chance of injury. I also utilize Asian techniques such as cupping and gua sha to relieve stagnation, promote blood flow and reduce pain. My fitness minded clients have found my approach to be the perfect complement to an active lifestyle. My more mature clients have benefited through increased range of motion and reduction in chronic pain.

I am unclothed and my clients are und*****. I like to start the massage with any therapeutic issues and then move into a more sensual touch, letting my hands wander to stimulate my client. I like to feel out my clients and intuitively respond with what they want and need. Every client responds to my touch differently and may want different types of stimulation. I’m open to some mutual touch based on mutual comfort. My goal is to make sure my client is comfortable, relaxed and happy with the experience. 

I have been providing massage services for the LGBT community for over 10 years. I also work in San Diego one week a month.

60 min $175

headline: Integrative Techniques. Lasting Results.
description:
I’m Amir. My work combines deep tissue, myofascial release, and intuitive bodywork to help relieve tension and restore balance in the body.

I don’t follow a fixed routine. I pay attention to how the body is holding stress, where it’s compensating, and what areas actually need focused work. Often the source of discomfort is not where the pain shows up, so my approach is about understanding the pattern, not just pressing on the symptom. The body adapts quietly over time, and tension can become so familiar it starts to feel like personality.

My sessions combine strong, controlled pressure with a slower pace that helps the body release tension while allowing the nervous system to settle. I work deliberately, not mechanically. Sometimes the work is deep and corrective, other times it’s about creating enough safety for the body to finally let go of what it has been bracing against.

The goal is not only relaxation, but helping you move more freely, breathe more deeply, and feel more connected to your body. Good bodywork is not about fighting the body. It’s about giving it permission to stop negotiating with stress.

Every session is tailored to the individual. Whether you’re dealing with chronic tightness, postural stress, physical fatigue, or mental overload, my focus is to help you leave feeling lighter, grounded, and restored.

headline: Serving LA • WeHo • Burbank • Calabasas
description:
Ray is a graduate of the National Holistic Institute, A College of Massage Therapy. Ray's expertise stems from a passion for understanding the intricacies of the human body and his commitment to providing personalized care for every individual he treats. With a firm grounding in therapeutic massage techniques, Ray has attained advanced proficiency in neuromuscular massage therapy, allowing him to effectively address connective tissue and muscle pain, as well as improve mobility and function. 

Ray is an enthusiastic athlete himself. His commitment to personal physical challenges has led him to complete the NYC Marathon, Los Angeles Marathon, and the Vineman Ironman. Ray brings the same disciplined approach and dedication to all aspects of his life, inspiring others with his drive and passion for holistic wellness. 

Modalities that Ray incorporates into each massage:

Neuromuscular Therapy, also sometimes referred to as Trigger Point Therapy, is a manual technique that involves applying direct sustained pressure to trigger points in the fascia that have accumulated throughout ones life through injury, poor posture, repeated misuse, or some other form of trauma to the body.

Sports Massage, originally designed to help athletes perform at optimum levels during games, it is growing in popularity as an effective treatment for sports­-related injuries or limited range of motion.

Deep tissue massage works by breaking down muscle adhesions that can build up after an accident or a chronic illness. By applying intense, controlled pressure and friction to an afflicted area across the grain of the muscle, deep tissue massage relaxes rigid tissue and relieves the pain associated with stiff muscles, ligaments and tendons.

Relaxation and Sensual Massage combine gentle, nurturing touch to soothe the nervous system, reduce mental stress, and support overall recovery. This mindful approach deepens relaxation while fostering a heightened connection with body awareness.

headline: Sound and touch combination
description:
Giving and receiving touch changed my life for the better back in my early 20's. The quote "The more flexible you are in your body, the more flexible you are in your life." really stuck out to me and led me to getting massages and eventually getting licensed in massage therapy.

I am a big fan of using techniques that can cause long lasting change without significant discomfort. I would describe my session as a detailed Swedish-style which isn’t a light featherlike massage but know that my intent isn’t to cause pain.

I have a flow I've developed that can both cover the whole body and put emphasis on specific areas you know you have tension in. I'm also open to you directing where you want focus. Want a whole session just on feet and legs? Sure. Just a session focused on back and shoulders? Sure. Want to spend time massaging me? Sure. It's your session and you deserve what sparks joy for you. 

For the face-down portion I use a traditional massage table and utilize a vibrational sound bed for when you are on your back. The sound and touch combination may be like nothing you have experienced.

I take in-calls only in Cathedral City Cove which is the area behind CCBC. 

Visit https://chestertuning.com for more details on sessions.

Text my phone the following 4 things:
1. Your first name so I know you’re not a spam text.
2. What day/time you are looking for (I might be available right away).
3. How long a session you would like.
4. Let me know you found me here on RM.

Session pricing:

headline: Good energy. Every body welcome!
description:
Hello, I'm Drew, a Certified Massage Therapist with skilled hands and an intuitive touch. 

Originally from Oklahoma, I migrated to the Coachella Valley of California to seek a new path in bodywork and massage. I bring a blend of therapeutic skill and spa-like relaxation to every session.

My style is grounded and restorative, combining traditional Swedish and Deep Tissue techniques along with stretching, trigger point, and myofascial work. 

Whether you’re carrying stress in your shoulders, tension in your back, or just need space to unwind, I adapt my work to your body.

I welcome the LGBTQIA+ community and work with all bodies and genders. My goal is to create a massage that feels personal, transformative, and memorable.

Book today and let me use the art of touch to help restore your body's natural rhythm and balance!

headline: Come see me in my Neon Nirvana
description:
I’m excited to reconnect and share my space with you again here in North Palm Springs. Over the past few months I’ve been transforming my massage studio into something truly special — a private escape designed to help you fully relax and leave the outside world behind.
My studio now features an abstract neon and black-light aesthetic with colorful artwork, a dreamy LED cloud ceiling, and a calming atmosphere meant to stimulate the senses while putting the body at ease. Clients also have access to a private infrared sauna as well as a personal bathroom and shower exclusively for your comfort and convenience.
My sessions are about connection, presence, and allowing yourself time to truly unwind. I believe touch can be incredibly powerful, and I take pride in creating an experience where you feel welcomed, respected, and free to relax into the moment. For those who enjoy it, I also offer hot stones as part of the session at no additional cost.
I want to sincerely apologize for my inconsistency with appointments lately. Between some technical communication issues, renovations in the studio (including new flooring), and navigating a very challenging personal situation that affected my emotional wellbeing, I needed some time to step back and regroup.
I’m grateful to say things are improving, I’ve gotten support, and I’m focusing on moving forward with a positive outlook. I’m here again with renewed energy and appreciation for the connections I make through my work.
If you’re looking for a private space to relax, escape the stress of daily life, and enjoy attentive, personalized bodywork, I would love to welcome you.

Thank you to those who have been patient and supportive — it truly means a lot.

headline: Experience The Sky Massage
description:
By blending Advanced Circulatory, Deep Tissue, Tui Na, and deep stretching techniques, I have crafted a uniquely restorative and intimate massage experience.
​Whether you are looking to recover from intense workouts or seeking a deeper emotional release, the Sky Massage is designed to:

​Enhance Performance: Increase your mobility, expand your range of motion, and help you break through bodybuilding plateaus.
​Relieve Tension: Eliminate muscle fatigue, pain, and physical stress while drastically reducing recovery time.
​Provide Holistic Healing: Release inner anxieties and provide profound, soul-deep relaxation.


​A Fully Customizable Experience
Your massage is dynamic and tailored completely to you. It can easily be adapted from strictly therapeutic to sensual (or further), depending entirely on your boundaries and comfort level.

​Rates & Offerings
I am a fully licensed, certified, and insured practitioner.

​Therapeutic & Sensual: Both standard therapeutic and sensual massages are offered at the same standard rate. (Note: Sensual massage is the default for any traffic coming through this portal).

headline: GOD CHOOSEN NO BS. (Labels Are Not Who You Are!
description:
Why I Do This Work - Be Direct - Priceless Experience - Choosen to Clear Your Programming- Tri- polar try me and find out! 
Gods Gift 
My life began in instability — moving through 26 foster homes and two years in juvenile hall. Early on, I learned how deeply the body carries stress, survival patterns, shame, and guardedness. For many years my nervous system lived in tension.

Through disciplined embodiment work, deep personal healing, and years of self-reflection, I transformed that tension into grounded presence. I learned how to move from survival into strength — not just mentally, but physically through the body.

That transformation is why I do this work.

I know what it feels like to be disconnected from yourself.
I also know what it feels like to come home.

Today I offer private one-on-one ceremonial bodywork and massage for men who carry pressure — leaders, providers, creators, and men who are constantly giving but rarely slow down.

My role is to guide you back to inner tranquility.

This work is not about indulgence.
It is about recalibration.

When the nervous system softens, clarity returns.
When stored tension releases, confidence stabilizes.
When the body becomes grounded, the mind follows.

Through intentional bodywork and presence, I help men release stress held in the body, reconnect with themselves, and return to life with more focus, strength, and calm.

This work may be right for you if:

• You carry stress quietly
• You feel the weight of responsibility
• You are tired of operating in constant tension
• You want depth rather than surface relaxation
• You value privacy, professionalism, and presence

I work with a limited number of clients so each session maintains focus, integrity, and depth.

If you are ready to release what no longer serves you and return to a grounded state of inner tranquility, you are welcome to reach out to reserve a private session.

headline: Flowing Intuitive Bodywork for Deep Body Balance
description:
Hi, my name is Jake.
Thanks for finding me here.

My Approach

Over the years I’ve spent a lot of time working with bodies — as a yoga instructor, personal trainer, Thai massage practitioner, and teacher of breathwork, meditation, and mindfulness.

One thing I’ve learned through all of these practices is that presence is the key.

When someone feels safe, supported, and genuinely cared for, the body naturally begins to relax and release tension on its own.

That’s the foundation of how I work.

I bring that sense of presence directly into my touch.

Rather than following a fixed routine, I allow the work to be intuitive. I listen through my hands and respond to what the body is asking for — where to stay, where to soften, and where to encourage release.

My background in Thai massage, Esalen massage, Reiki, and years of working with many different bodies allows me to blend techniques naturally within the session.

Some moments may include flowing massage strokes, gentle stretching, focused pressure, or slower calming touch.

Everything unfolds based on what your body needs in the moment.

My goal is simple:

To help you feel safe enough that your body can truly let go.

When the body relaxes deeply, muscles begin to release their tension naturally. Breathing becomes fuller, the nervous system settles, and energy starts to move more freely throughout the body.

Many people leave sessions feeling:

• deeply relaxed
• refreshed and lighter
• more open in their body
• breathing more fully
• calm and grounded

Clients often describe the experience as feeling like a slow wave moving through the body, helping tension dissolve while bringing a deep sense of ease.

Feel free to reach out. I’d be happy to connect and see if it feels like the right fit.
You can also learn more about my work & explore my other offerings here:  https://www.jakeferree.com/massage-bodywork

Looking forward to meeting you.

headline: Sacred Touch • Deep Bodywork & Energy Work
description:
If you’re looking for more than a routine massage, you’re in the right place.

I offer a calm, attentive, and highly personalized massage experience designed to help you relax deeply, release tension, and feel fully present in your body. My work blends skilled hands-on bodywork with an unhurried pace and grounded presence, allowing stress to melt away and sensation to return.

Each session is customized in real time. Some clients come for physical relief or recovery. Others come to unwind, feel nurtured, and reconnect with their body on a deeper level. However you arrive, the goal is the same: you leave feeling lighter, calmer, and more at ease in yourself.

The Experience

Touch is confident, intentional, and slow enough to let your nervous system soften. I pay close attention to rhythm, pressure, and response, creating a flow that feels natural and deeply relaxing. The space is private, discreet, and quietly indulgent — a place where you can let go, sink in, and fully receive.

headline: 25 Years of Intuitive Healing: A Tranquil Escape
description:
With over 25 years of professional experience, I am deeply passionate about the art of healing. My massage style is a thoughtful blend of Deep Tissue and Swedish techniques, meticulously customized to meet your specific needs and preferred pressure. Standing 6' 2" and weighing approximately 250 pounds, I maintain a strong, athletic build that allows me to provide a firm, consistent, and powerful touch. My large hands are particularly effective at covering more surface area and applying the deep, steady pressure needed to release stubborn tension.

I believe in a comprehensive approach to wellness, providing a full-body experience that addresses tension from head to toe. While I can incorporate light stretching upon request, my primary focus is always on providing a session tailored entirely to your relaxation and physical relief. For those seeking the ultimate restorative experience, I also offer an exclusive four-hand session alongside my husband, who is also an experienced massage therapist. Together, we provide a seamless, synchronized treatment designed for a truly immersive wellness experience.

Whether in my private home studio or as I travel throughout the United States, the environment is one of absolute peace and tranquility. I utilize soft candlelight, light music, and a large, comfortably padded massage table to ensure a premium spa-like experience in a private setting.

I take great pride in maintaining an inclusive practice where everyone is welcome—straight, gay, bisexual, and transgender clients alike. I especially enjoy guiding first-time clients through their initial session, ensuring they feel safe, respected, and truly cared for. Through an intuitive touch, I work to release deep-seated tension, ease sore muscles, and melt away the stresses of daily life. Your satisfaction is always guaranteed.

headline: Hands-On Healing
description:
Howdy,

We are social creatures, as such it is an intrinsic human need to feel connected. It's not a want, not a desire, not a dream, we ALL need to feel connected, in some shape or form. Be it physically, emotionally, mentally, ect. A need needs to be met! If not directly, then the subconscious will get it done. And the subconscious works in the shadows. As babies, we are born dependent creatures, and stay that way for the first two decades of lives. Ever lost anyone? We can't eat, can't sleep, can't think. It'd not uncommon that basic human needs go out the window after a major loss, even our need for safety sometimes. It strikes at our core to be ostracized, abandoned, isolated, even the threat of rejection can feel like life or death.  

Or maybe you're just bored,  and looking for a fun way to spend the afternoon.

In any case, that's what I'm here for. I'm happy to provide an opportunity for connection. Be it through touch, conversation, a hug, just company, a warm body, relaxation, or whatever you need to make it through the temporarily stressful situation you might be going through. 

My massage session is designed to meet the needs of the individual (or couple) in as an efficient, simple, and direct manner possible. 
I like to utilize various massage techniques, such as: deep tissue, trigger points, reflexology, Thai massage,  as well as yoga, and Reiki (energy work). 
I have a table for incalls only. 
Same-day appointments are accepted. Flexible schedule, prefer daytime, evenings tend to fill up quickly, also late night hours available.
Incalls and outcalls rates are the same. 

Also, I have a background in working in the mental health field (7yrs). As such, I have a high degree of respect for confidentiality and discretion. 
Also, I'm very accepting, open-minded, and curious, which has been supremely helpful.   

Ultimately, my goal is to help you feel better!


Thank you,
Peter

description:

Techniques may include Swedish massage, deep tissue or myofascial release, assisted stretching, trigger point therapy, and cupping.

headline: Energetic. Sensual. Kinky.
description:
Hi! My name is Kinsey! My work is simple: I help people learn to trust their own body, mind, and emotions — in whatever order their system needs.

Each session is tailored uniquely for you. My offerings can include one or more of the following:

Energetic: Many clients like to start here. This is where we can truly connect and attune to each other. I will lead you through exercises such as eye gazing, deep breathing, light touch, and slow movement. The goal is to get you out of your head and into your body.

Sensual: Here I use touch and sensation ***s to bring your body to life. I will start with a massage and then use ***s that cover different types of sensations such as soft floggers, light scratching, light impact, hot/cold temperatures, metal and pressure.

Kinky: This is where the intensity gets turned up! Once your body is ready, I will use medium and heavy floggers, paddles, psychological word play, and so much more! The Kink realm is my specialty and the options are truly limitless!

I believe our relationship with ourselves is the core relationship. The more deeply we can connect with our own bodies, the more naturally and honestly we can connect with others. I love supporting people in expanding pleasure through healing — and in discovering how healing can emerge through pleasure.

Currently working out of East Austin.

headline: Time 4 a Summer Tune Up
description:
The PrimalTouch Experience is designed for men carrying deep physical and mental tension — stress stored in the hips, legs, lower back, shoulders, and nervous system — who are ready to release, reset, and reconnect with their body.

This is more than a standard massage. It is slow, intentional, body-aware work that blends deep-tissue release, sports recovery, sensory pacing, intuitive touch, and nervous-system downshift.

My work is adaptive and responsive to your body in real time. I follow restriction patterns, breath, pressure response, and subtle shifts in the body to unwind tension methodically.

Nothing rushed. Nothing mechanical. Every sequence has purpose.

The work is deep when needed, slow when needed, and intentionally paced to help the body open, respond, and release. Clients often report feeling lighter, clearer, deeply relaxed, more open, and more connected to their body after session work.

Best for:
• Deep physical tension
• Hip, glute, thigh, and lower-back restriction
• Shoulder, neck, and upper-back tightness
• Sports recovery and post-event reset
• Stress held in the nervous system
• Men who want grounded, attentive, full-body work
Specialized Focus:
• Deep Tissue Release
• Sports Recovery & Restoration
• Hip, glute, and thigh decompression
• Lower-body tension work often overlooked in standard massage
• Slow, grounded, intentional touch flow
• Breath, pressure, and body-awareness integration
• Sensory pacing and deeply attuned bodywork

          》》》》》》Thai massage《《《《《《

Thai massage works your entire body. It's one of the most invigorating types of massages, as the therapist rigorously manipulates your body, moving it into yoga-like stretches. (It's sometimes referred to as "Yoga for the lazy".) The therapist uses every part of his or her body--hands, knees, legs, and feet--to not only stretch you but also apply pressure on your muscles and loosen your joints. This type of massage is both energizing and, at times, relaxing.

Best for: Improving energy, increased flexibility, overall health and well-being.

I recently completed massage therapy school and earned my professional license — which means I combine fresh technique with a grounded, intuitive approach. Each session builds on my training and experience to deliver real results and lasting calm.

I’ve spent the last few years honing my style — blending Swedish, deep tissue, compression, and intuitive touch — and I’m always learning more about how to help clients feel their best. Expect a strong yet gentle presence that holds space for your relaxation and renewal.

Outside of massage, I’m usually at the gym, at the beach when traveling, or grabbing a bite with friends. I’m a writer, road tripper, and loyal Raising Cane’s fan. Massage is how I slow down and reconnect — and I’m honored to offer that same experience to others.

headline: NEW TO DALLAS! Massage and Personal Training
description:
New to the Dallas Uptown/Oak Lawn community and excited to bring my years of experience, energy, and passion for wellness to an incredible new group of people. I am a certified personal trainer and massage therapist with over 20 years of experience focused on fitness, recovery, relaxation, and genuine personal connection.

I offer a range of massage experiences from relaxing therapeutic and deep tissue sessions to more sensual/****** bodywork designed to help you fully unwind, reconnect, and recharge. In addition to massage, I provide customized personal training sessions tailored to your individual fitness goals, whether that’s strength, conditioning, mobility, weight loss, or overall wellness.

Deep Tissue Massage
A therapeutic massage technique focused on relieving chronic muscle tension, stiffness, and pain. Using firm pressure and slow strokes, it targets deeper layers of muscle and connective tissue. Often used for recovery, stress relief, injury prevention, and improved mobility. Clients may experience temporary soreness followed by increased relaxation and flexibility.
Sensual Massage
A relaxation-focused massage that emphasizes soothing touch, calming energy, and heightened body awareness. It is designed to create comfort, connection, and a luxurious full-body experience in a peaceful environment. Techniques are generally lighter, flowing, and intended to reduce stress while promoting emotional and physical relaxation.
****** Massage
An intimate form of massage centered around sensuality, arousal, and physical pleasure between consenting adults. It combines relaxing bodywork with deliberate ****** touch to enhance intimacy and stimulation. The atmosphere is typically slow, seductive, and focused on creating a deeply personal sensory experience.

Accepts Cash or Zelle.  Currently no Venmo.

description:

Hi,
My name is Tan, I am a skilled dancer and acrobat, proficient in diverse massage, movement, and release techniques. My background as a professional dancer and acrobat equips me with a deep understanding of anatomy and physiology, as well as strong fingers and hands. It informs my massage technique, and I give much attention to the quality of my touch and rhythm of motion.

I work in an intimate atmosphere and offer a personally tailored session to fit your body, preferences, and needs. I offer my sessions on a professional, high-quality plush massage table and use top notch organic massage balms and oils. For outcalls, I have an excellent headrest bed extension that can transform any bed into a massage table.

headline: Private Studio  ·  Gay-Owned  ·  Massage your way
description:
Greg & Jason — married, licensed therapists in our private Vancouver, WA studio. Two guys who love what they do and built the space to prove it. Clients regularly tell us it's the best massage of their lives.
Recent certifications added to our roster: Clinical Medical Massage (Costa Rica) and Mana Lomi Master Level (Kona, Hawaii). We are prepared to help you with past injuries or chronic body aches and pains.
This is a space where all feel genuinely welcome.

THE FOUR-HANDED EXPERIENCE
A four-handed massage is a choreographed dance of touch and intention. Four hands moving in synchronized rhythm create something your nervous system has no framework for. It tries to track the movement — and eventually stops trying. What happens in that surrender is something most men have never felt on a table. Book it once. You'll understand why clients come back weekly.

THE SPACE
Professional unscented oils, also CBD-infused. Infrared sauna, Full body red light panel, Full red light therapy immersion pod, Red Light Shower. PEMF mat, warm towel, and bottled water. Studio built entirely around what the body needs.

CREDENTIALS
🌺 Hawaiian Lomi Lomi Massage — Aloha Massage Academy 2006 - 2007
🌺 Mana Lomi — Master Level
💧 Vodder Manual Lymphatic Drainage — certified

headline: Skilled Touch. Deep Work. Intentional Release.
description:
My sessions are intended to provide you all the space, training, and lack of expectations of a professional session, but in a container that feels deeply queer and alive to all the ways a tactile practitioner can relax you. Basically, I want to provide you the best of RentMasseur and a clinical massage in one space.

My sessions start with a quick conversation about your goals, comfort levels with different types of touch, and a standing assessment. My goal is to release whatever is pulling on your system the most to make the rest of the work go further. From there, I move into deep, slow, rhythmic work that is both focused and sensory. I pull from myofascial, Swedish, pelvic floor manual therapy, structural integration, and Tui Na—using whatever combination makes your body feel best. Just know I don’t do generic, mindless full-body massages; I prioritize guys who want to collaborate on a clear intention to make their body feel amazing.

My sessions are always 80–100 minutes. I aim for about 80 minutes on the table before I have you stand up, feel into your body, and check in. We keep those last 20 minutes open to make you feel balanced and completely reset. Does one shoulder still feel tighter than the other? Does your nervous system need more of a release? We use that time at the end to make sure you walk out feeling balanced, awesome, and calm.

Tell me what you’d like! What would make your body feel relaxed and what would you like the most targeted work on?

Text messages are always better than RM messages. My rates are $150 at my home studio in Portland, and $250 when I’m traveling and visiting elsewhere.

$10 discount on your next session for reviews on here as well.

I offer discounts for other bodyworkers, and younger guys dealing with present muscle pain. Too often I see guys wait to start getting bodywork until they’re older and the pain is constant—I’d much rather see you before it gets to that point!

My massages focus on cultivating presence, connection, and intimacy through a consistent, responsive, and intentional process. If you’re coming to me for relaxation, or release, great! These are things I can help you with. However, relaxation is just one step, and release is one of many possible goals of my massage practice. Each session begins with building rapport and open communication around boundaries, desires, comfort with touch and nudity, and relevant body‑mind practices, so we can establish safety and trust together. I guide your experience by coaching breath, encouraging vocalization, and using a range of pressures to help you fully inhabit your body and arrive in the present moment. As your relaxation deepens, emotions and deeper needs often arise naturally, and the session evolves collaboratively. This may include ****** touch, nurturing contact, stillness, or another form of support, and is always guided by your priorities, our prior agreements, and my intuitive responsiveness.

Full-Body Deep Tissue sessions begin with slow, grounding compressions and gentle joint stretches to prepare and assess the body. From there, we move methodically through each area—layer by layer—addressing postural imbalances, chronic tension, adhesions, and patterns of restriction.  

Each treatment concludes in a soothing integration phase featuring neck and cranial massage, flowing Lomi Lomi movements, and gentle rhythmic touch. The result is a profound sense of balance: muscles feel lighter, joints freer, and energy renewed.  

You are invited to experience this work and share your reflections—your feedback helps refine the practice and deepen the care offered to every client.

headline: Arcturus Bodyworks - Booking Now!
description:
Hey there — I'm Copper, and I've been doing this work for over 10 years. I genuinely believe that skilled, intentional touch is one of the most underrated forms of human medicine.

I'm a massage therapist by training — deep tissue, acupressure, sports therapy, and intuitive bodywork are my foundation. But Arcturus Bodyworks isn't your sterile spa experience. It's a warm, private studio in North Capitol Hill where you get my full presence, my full skill set, and zero judgment. I welcome all body types, all energy levels, and all reasons for showing up. Big guys especially — I have hands that actually know what to do with a larger frame.

Some clients come for deep therapeutic work. Some come for something slower, more intentional — touch that lingers, that sees you. All of it is valid here. All of it is welcome. That quiet, tender need? I don't take it lightly — I consider it some of the most meaningful work I do.

FAQs
What does a Therapeutic massage include? - Targeted deep work, acupressure, and real relief for real tension. Every session is customized to what your body actually needs — whether that's working out a stubborn knot, releasing chronic tightness, or just a full reset from the neck down.

What does a Sensual massage include? - Think long, unhurried full-body glides, feather-light touch on soft and tender areas, and a level of presence and attention that most people have never experienced on a table. It's a feast for the senses — warmth, intention, and skilled hands that never lose contact with your skin. 

Do you offer intimacy or bonding sessions? Yes. For clients seeking safe human connection — whether that's grief, longing, or simply the need to be held in some way — I offer space for that. Always between consenting adults, always handled with care.

Rates: $120 / 60 min • $180 / 90 min • $240 / 120 min • $300 / 180 min Longer sessions are where the real magic happens — your body will thank you.

📍 North Capitol Hill, Denver | Text or email to book.

headline: Come unwind with me
description:

headline: A space to relax, reset, and just be you.
description:
I have lived a pretty unconventional life, and I would not have it any other way. I am a military veteran, a certified veterinary technician, a pilot, a cybersecurity professional, and a singer. I even grew up as a rodeo cowboy. I have always been the kind of person who follows curiosity and experience wherever it leads, and life has taken me through some interesting worlds.

Outside of work, I love music more than anything. I also love dogs, tattoos, fresh air, and the kind of easy conversation that happens when people feel comfortable being themselves. I enjoy meeting interesting people, hearing their stories, and finding the next excuse to travel.

For me, massage is less about clinical technique and more about connection, energy, and helping someone truly relax. I will be honest. I am not the guy you call for deep tissue punishment. What I love is skin-to-skin bodywork, slow exploration, and creating a space where you can unwind and enjoy the moment. Matching your energy matters to me, so our time together feels natural and comfortable.

I stay active, take care of myself, and enjoy helping other men slow down and relax. I have a comfortable private space set up, and if you're in the mood, we can even relax in the hot tub after.

I am very easy-going and pretty much impossible to shock. Some guys come for quiet relaxation. Others want conversation and connection. All of it is welcome here.

I can host or travel within the Salt Lake City area, and I am often available even if the calendar does not show it. Text me for my rates and availability, and please mention RentMasseur in your first message.

Come exactly as you are. Gay, straight, bisexual, or curious. My space is inclusive, respectful, and judgment-free. Everyone is welcome. Texting is my preferred method of communication.
